pageContext.name: Scarif Stormtrooper 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Scarif™ Stormtroopers patrolled the shores of the tropical planet Scarif and fought in unforgettable battle scenes in Rogue One: A Star Wars Story™. These pure silver coins follow the shape and colour of the Scarif Stormtrooper's helmet, and every distinct detail is captured with additional light relief to give an incredible 3D-feel.  The latest in our Faces of the Empire™ Collection, this remarkable collectible arrives packaged inside a compact and modern Star Wars™-branded case with a large window for ease of display. The Certificate of Authenticity on the back of the case features the coin's unique number in the limited 10,000 mintage.   Don't wait – add one to your Star Wars collection today!
